creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
gnutls-2.12.23.tar.bz2 isn't available from ftp.FreeBSD.org.

ftp://ftp.gnutls.org/gcrypt/gnutls/v2.12/gnutls-2.12.23.tar.bz2
is returning permission denied.

Fix: 

Please copy ftp://ftp.gnutls.org/gcrypt/gnutls/v2.12/gnutls-2.12.23.tar.bz2 to 
ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/security/gnutls && make fetch 
or
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/gnutls-2.12.23.tar.bz2
